hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.swift ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *DerivedData* ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *SourcePackages* ]]; then cd /Users/kesavan/meApp-1/iOS && swiftlint lint --config .swiftlint.yml --reporter xcode --quiet "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -30; fi
